description: Validation gates for schema, symbolic time, assets, references, overlap warnings, and id uniqueness.

scenarios.story: As a CLI user, I want malformed timelines rejected at the schema gate.
scenarios.given: timeline.json is missing required fields like duration or tracks.
then: error.code starts with BAD_ or NO_

scenarios.story: As an AI user, I want symbolic-time cycles and dangling refs rejected with structured errors.
scenarios.given: A clip start references a missing marker or creates a cycle.

scenarios.story: As an exporter, I want missing assets downgraded to warnings.
scenarios.given: assets[] contains a path that does not exist on disk.
then: The warning names the asset id

scenarios.story: As a timeline editor, I want unknown scene ids rejected.
scenarios.given: A clip references a scene that is not in REGISTRY.
then: The failing clip id is attached
The hint lists available scene ids

scenarios.story: As a user, I want same-track overlaps surfaced without crashing validation.
scenarios.given: Two clips overlap on the same video track.
then: Validation still returns a structured report
The report names the track id

scenarios.story: As a maintainer, I want duplicate ids rejected.
scenarios.given: The same track id or clip id appears twice.
then: The duplicate id is attached via ref
